$comment: View of capability → dossier ids. Can be regenerated from either backoffice/pages/dossiers.py (Capability map tab → 'Bygg om') or `npm run dossiers:capability-map:write` (scripts/dossiers/regenerate-capability-map.ts). Runtime walks data/dossiers/{hard,soft}/ directly; this file is for tooling + sanity check during curation.
